LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ambassador_Dress.descrip: A stylish dress often worn by the ambassadors of the New California Republic. While it provides little to no actual protection, it boosts its wearer's confidence during negotiation.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ambassador_Dress.label: NCR Ambassador Dress
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ambassador_Suit.descript: A stylish suit often worn by the ambassadors of the New California Republic. While it provides little to no actual protection, it boosts its wearer's confidence during negotiation.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ambassador_Suit.label: NCR Ambassador's Suit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Engineer_Jumpsuit.descri: A khaki jumpsuit with many pockets and pouches attached. It�s commonly worn by engineers and other technical personnel associated with the NCR. It�s useful for carrying around a few spare tools but provides little protection in a firefight.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Engineer_Jumpsuit.label: NCR Engineer Jumpsuit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Generals_Uniform.descrip: A uniform reserved for the highest-ranking officers of the republic�s army, the generals. It�s heavily decorated with motifs commonly associated with the NCR, such as the two-headed bear. It doesn�t offer much protection, however, since the generals of the army rarely serve on the frontlines.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Generals_Uniform.label: NCR General Uniform
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Presidents_Suit.descript: A stylish suit often worn by the president of the New California Republic and similar high-ranking government officials. While it provides little to no actual protection, it gives its wearer an air of authority.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Presidents_Suit.label: NCR President Suit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Casual.descriptio: An outfit often worn by the rangers off-duty or underneath additional armour pieces. It�s reminiscent of the outfits worn by the cowboys of alt. It�s quite rugged and offers good protection against the scorching sun but should not be the only protection a rangers has once the bullets start flying.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Casual.label: NCR Ranger Casual Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Patrol_Armor.desc: A suit of brownish combat armor, hand-manufactured in the NCR and most often worn by the NCR Rangers. As it is combat armor, it�s sturdy and protects very well against damage, but weighs quite a lot.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Red_Scarf.descrip: Rugged clothes worn by the desert rangers. This particular outfit comes with a red scarf. Like most ranger clothes, it insulates well against the heat.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Red_Scarf.label: NCR Ranger Red Scarf Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Vest.description: A rugged vest worn by NCR Rangers. It provides good protection against the elements and is ideal for long patrols and reconnaissance missions in harsh environments.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Vest.label: NCR Ranger Vest Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Veteran_Armor.des: A combat vest composed of the chestplate of a combat armour. It�s often worn by the rangers and offers formidable protection. Its biggest drawback is that it only covers the torso, leaving the appendages unprotected.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Veteran_Duster.de: A duster often worn by the rangers. It�s main use is to protect the wearer against the sun and temperatures of the Mojave Desert, but it�s thick enough to provide additional protection in a firefight as well.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Veteran_Uniform.d: A set of clothes made from tough materials such as leathers. It�s often worn underneath armour by the rangers and is particularly well insulating against heat.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Salvaged_Power_Armor.des: A suit of T-45d power armor, captured by the NCR during the NCR-Brotherhood war. Technicians stripped out the servomotors and replaced the rad scrubbers with a custom air conditioning module, allowing it to be used by saltiers without the need of specialised training. This process, however, makes the armor much less effective. Despite that it still is, essentially, power armor and offers superior protection at the cost of enormous weight. It's usually only worn by the NCR heavy troopers.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Scout_Recon_Armor.descri: An armor usually worn by the NCR�s sniper squads and recon teams. It�s very similar looking to other NCR armor, but is darker for camouflage purposes. It provides good protection but, like most NCR armors, is quite heavy.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Scout_Recon_Armor.label: NCR Recon Assault Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Armor.descriptio: The standard armor for the rank and file of the NCR military forces. It�s composed of a khaki field jacket and breeches, an armored breastplate and brown combat boots. It protects its wearer well but is heavy.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Armor.label: NCR Trooper Armor
This armor is essentially the regular NCR armed forces uniform composed of a khaki field jacket and breeches, an armored breastplate and brown combat boots, but features a bandoleer for carrying additional ammunition and other military equipment.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Fatigues.descrip: This light piece of clothing consists of the standard khaki field jacket and breeches but lacks the armored breastplate other NCR armors sport. As such it is lighter but offers only inferior protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Fatigues.label: NCR Trooper Fatigues
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Mantle_Armor.des: This suit of armor is often worn by the sergeants and corporals of the NCR military. In addition to the standard khaki field jacket and breeches, as well as an armored breastplate, this armor also features a camouflaged cloth wrapped around the shoulder. It offers decent protection but is quite heavy.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_MP_Uniform.descr: A uniform labelling the wearer as a member of the NCR military police. It�s quite similar to other NCR uniforms but radiates the authority of the military police.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_MP_Uniform.label: NCR MP Uniform
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Vest.description: A vest often worn by NCR troopers. It�s composed of a reinforced chestplate and armoured pauldrons. While it offers quite a bit of additional protection, it only covers the torso and shoulders, leaving the lower body parts and the head unprotected.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Vest.label: NCR Trooper Vest
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Guard_Vest.description: A padded vest often worn by the guards of the NCRCF. While less protective than full-blown armour, it guards its wearer quite well against sEinkaufszentrum firearms.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Guard_Vest.label: NCRCF Guard Vest
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Inmate_Uniform.descrip: A simple blue shirt with pants issued to the inmates of the NCRCF. These are simple clothes cheaply mass-produced in the NCR. As such they offer little to no protection in a fight but isolate quite well against the heat, since the NCR likes to use the inmates as roadworkers.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Inmate_Uniform.label: NCRCF Inmate Uniform
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Over_Shirt.description: A simple overshirt worn by inmates of the NCRCF. It�s meant to identify the inmates as such and doesn�t offer much protection against any kind of threat. Despite this, the Powder Gangers still wear these, probably because of the lack of alternative garments.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Over_Shirt.label: NCRCF Over Shirt
